query: We use ghcr.io/gecut/nginx/cdn:2.0.0 for a Vite asset origin. app-C6uTJdX2.js is immutable but our manifest and service worker look wrong. Audit the exact Cache-Control, ETag, and Vary behavior and give us curl checks for CI.
Create a production Dockerfile and compose.yaml for the Gecut nginx CDN image. public/ contains hashed JS, fonts, JSON and HTML; mount nothing writable at /data and keep 404 responses uncacheable.
nginx/cdn is classifying our uppercase asset hash incorrectly. I need to override the URI cache map in a child image without losing status-based no-store or creating duplicate Cache-Control headers.

Our static origin is gecut/nginx/cdn behind Fastly. Explain which headers originate from the container versus Fastly and help verify s-maxage, conditional ETags, negative caching, and Vary before we touch provider config.
Enable NGINX_AUTO_WEBP on ghcr.io/gecut/nginx/cdn and diagnose why JPEG requests with Accept: image/webp work but CORS disappears. We need one Vary header and must retain 404 no-store.
Prepare a Kubernetes Deployment and Service for gecut/nginx/cdn:2.0.0, using /server-info probes and a read-only static-content volume. Explain why the root filesystem cannot blindly be read-only.
I set NGINX_CDN_CACHE_HASHED and NGINX_CDN_S_MAXAGE but /assets/main.js is still short cached. Trace how this image classifies filenames and tell me whether env vars can add a new fingerprint regex.

Audit a derived image FROM ghcr.io/gecut/nginx/cdn:2.0.0 that adds templates under http.d and location.d. Focus on envsubst order, regex location precedence, add_header inheritance, and nginx -T verification.
Our CDN origin logs the load balancer IP. Configure the Gecut nginx/cdn real-IP contract safely using explicit IPv4/IPv6 CIDRs, and include checks that untrusted X-Forwarded-For is ignored.

A missing .js file from gecut/nginx/cdn is being cached at the edge. Help prove whether origin returns 404 plus no-store, inspect the effective rendered config, and separate provider negative caching from NGINX behavior.
Host my React Router build so /users/42 and /settings return index.html while missing /assets/app.js stays 404. Use the Gecut NGINX stack and validate the shell exists at startup.
Configure nginx proxy_cache in front of our Node API, cache GET /products for 30 seconds, bypass authenticated requests, and add stale-if-error behavior with an upstream keepalive pool.
Write Cloudflare Cache Rules for example.com: ignore utm_* query parameters, cache GraphQL POST responses by body hash, and purge cache when our CMS webhook fires.
We serve static files from Amazon S3 behind CloudFront. Create an Origin Access Control policy, set response header policies, and write Terraform for invalidations after deployment.
Tune a generic Ubuntu NGINX installation for a 10 GB video download service. I need sendfile, aio threads, byte ranges, directio, TLS 1.3, and systemd limits.
Use cert-manager and ingress-nginx to issue a Let's Encrypt wildcard certificate, redirect HTTP to HTTPS, configure mTLS for /admin, and rotate the secret automatically.
Our Express app sets Cache-Control twice through helmet and a custom middleware. Refactor the TypeScript middleware and add Supertest coverage for authenticated API responses.
Build a Varnish VCL that supports surrogate keys, grace mode, ESI fragments, cookie normalization, and BAN-based purging for our Drupal origin.
Analyze browser HTTP caching conceptually: freshness lifetime, validators, heuristic caching, Age, Warning, stale-while-revalidate, and how RFC 9111 treats shared caches.

Our Next.js standalone server needs immutable /_next/static assets but dynamic RSC and route-handler responses must preserve framework cache tags. Fix the Next.js deployment, not a separate static origin.
